<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="decomp" name="System Element Decomposition"> <mxGraphModel dx="-640" dy="-137" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="System Element Decomposition" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="10" width="600" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="root" value="Sentinel Gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="60" width="260" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se01" value="SE-01: Linux Gateway Subsystem
(QEMU ARM64)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="140" width="360" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se011" value="SE-01.1 Operating System
Yocto Linux (Poky)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="190" width="160" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se012" value="SE-01.2 Gateway Core Application" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="245" width="320" height="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0121" value="Protobuf Handler" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="275" width="95" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0122" value="Sensor Proxy" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="175" y="275" width="85" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0123" value="Actuator Proxy" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="275" width="95" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0124" value="Health Monitor" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="315" width="95" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0125" value="Diagnostics" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="175" y="315" width="85" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0126" value="Config Manager" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="315" width="95" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0127" value="Logger" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6d0de;strokeColor=#996185;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="70" y="355" width="95" height="20" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0131" value="USB Ethernet (CDC-ECM)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=8;" parent="1" id="se02" value="SE-02: MCU Subsystem
(QEMU ARM, STM32U575)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=3;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="140" width="380" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se021" value="SE-02.1 Application Layer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="190" width="340" height="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0211" value="Sensor Acq" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="470" y="220" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0212" value="Actuator Ctrl
ASIL-B" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=8;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="220" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0213" value="Protobuf
(nanopb)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="220" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se0214" value="Watchdog" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="730" y="220" width="60"
